g.text: Heym is a true AI-native workflow automation platform
A visual canvas with a broad node library — wire intent into execution.
Describe a workflow in plain text or voice — nodes wire themselves.
Context-aware Q&A from any docs page — the current article is the prompt.
SKILL.md and Python files — drafted, previewed, and saved live.
Tool calling · Python · MCP · skills · memory · batch · fallback.
An orchestrator visually delegates to named sub-agents and sub-workflows.
Pause execution. Public review URL. Edit, accept, or refuse — then resume.
Hi Sam — refund approved on order
Filtering, NSFW protection, multilingual safety — on every LLM and Agent.
Insert + semantic search on Qdrant or psql — two nodes, no glue code.
Connect Agent nodes to any server. Expose your workflow as one.
Public at /chat/{slug} — streaming, file uploads, no frontend code.
/execute/stream emits per-node start, complete, and result events.
Structured storage out of the box. Pre-built workflows to launch from.
Independent nodes go concurrent. Broken Playwright selectors? AI rewrites them.
Full request, response, tool calls, timing — and a one-click test suite.
One container. No telemetry. ⌘K for everything else.
Run-aware AI feedback writes purpose, step behavior, and improvement areas.
Create datatables and dashboard widgets from natural-language commands.
▸ create a sales table and dashboard by region
Per-trace token counts become live USD spend by model and provider.
